items.raw_desc: Szenzor SAFE Fire Guard, fehér:                SAFE Fire Guard sensorThe SAFE Fire Guard wireless fire detector represents a new generation of home security that combines timeless design with uncompromising dual-spectrum optical detection technology. Thanks to the unique combination of a blue and infrared LED sensor, the device can distinguish in real time between a real threat in the form of smoke and harmless influences such as water vapor or dust, thereby virtually eliminating the risk of false alarms. The detector is fully integrated into the SAFE system via the secure SAFEKeeper protocol with AES encryption and a range of up to 1,000 meters, and in case of danger it immediately activates the loud built-in siren (85 dB) and sends a notification to the ProSAFE mobile app. With a replaceable battery with a lifespan of up to 3 years, an integrated temperature sensor and a superior 36-month warranty, you get a reliable guard that watches over your safety 24 hours a day.
